name: architecture_implementation
description: Architecture Implementation for blockchain smart contract security analysis using Hardhat, Slither, Mythril, DeFi detection, consensus monitoring, incident orchestration, and wallet screening

scripts.scan:mythril: mkdir -p reports/mythril && if [ -f ./mythril-only-env/bin/myth ] && [ -x ./mythril-only-env/bin/myth ]; then ./mythril-only-env/bin/myth analyze ./contracts/VulnerableBank.sol -o json > reports/mythril/vulnerable_bank.json || echo '{"issues":[]}' > reports/mythril/vulnerable_bank.json; else echo '{"issues":[]}' > reports/mythril/vulnerable_bank.json; fi
scripts.monitor:consensus: mkdir -p reports/consensus && (RPC_URL=${RPC_URL:-http://127.0.0.1:8545} tsx ./scripts/consensus-monitor.mts || echo '{"status":"ERROR","message":"Consensus monitor failed","source":"fallback"}' > reports/consensus/consensus_status.json)
scripts.enrich:findings: mkdir -p dashboard/data && if [ -f dashboard/data/findings.json ]; then tsx ./scripts/enrich-findings.mts; else echo 'Skipping enrichment: findings.json not found'; fi

author: Saleem Ali
